compiled_state.title: Update test-recipe-registry.sh: add recipe_type field validation tests
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Update tests/scripts/test-recipe-registry.sh (created in story 5108-39a1) to add test cases asserting the recipe_type field validates correctly against the JSON schema. Tests must fail until T-SR-05 adds recipe_type to the schema.

### New tests to add:
1. test_generative_recipe_type_valid: A registry entry with recipe_type=generative passes schema validation.
2. test_transform_recipe_type_valid: A registry entry with recipe_type=transform passes schema validation.
3. test_invalid_recipe_type_caught: A registry entry with recipe_type=invalid fails schema validation.
4. test_missing_recipe_type_still_valid: A registry entry without recipe_type still passes validation (field is optional for backward compat with S1/S2 entries that don't have it).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test-recipe-registry.sh contains recipe_type validation tests
  Verify: grep -q 'recipe_type' tests/scripts/test-recipe-registry.sh
- [ ] Tests fail before schema is updated with recipe_type field
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-recipe-registry.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL\|Error' || true
